mapping_metadata.analyzer: Senior Test Automation Mapping Specialist Agent

test_case_mappings.test_case_description: Test case to verify the Billing Cycle Period card behavior on Print and Payment History page when a plan is paused, including verification of complimentary pages, additional pages, progress bars, tooltips, and page count displays.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Enroll the Ink printer with 50 pages plan or higher.
precondition_mapping.notes: No printer enrollment methods or API helpers found in this batch. UpdatePlanPage is for plan management UI, not enrollment. RTPDS payloads are printer status data, not enrollment methods. Enrollment functionality likely exists in other batches containing enrollment page objects or API helper modules.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the Subscription has no free months info.
precondition_mapping.notes: No subscription verification methods or API helpers found in this batch. UpdatePlanPage has a 'free_trial_plan_details' locator for displaying free trial info, but no methods to verify or set subscription state. Subscription state verification likely exists in API helper modules in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the subscription is "subscribed" status.
precondition_mapping.notes: No subscription status verification methods found in this batch. UpdatePlanPage is a UI page object without status verification logic. API helpers for subscription status checks likely exist in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Click the Pause Plan button on CIT modal or "Pause Instant Ink" link to trigger the pause plan.
precondition_mapping.notes: UpdatePlanPage has 'pause_plan_info' and 'resume_plan_link' locators for displaying pause status and resuming a paused plan, but no explicit 'pause_plan_button' or 'pause_instant_ink_link' locators for initiating a pause. The page object appears to handle plan changes and resuming paused plans, but the pause initiation button may be on a different page or modal not present in this batch. Pause plan action methods likely exist in other batches containing dashboard or plan management page objects.

test_case_mappings.no_match_reason: This test case is focused on the Print and Payment History page and specifically the Billing Cycle Period card behavior during a paused plan scenario. Batch 16 contains UpdatePlanPage which is a different page object for plan selection, upgrade, downgrade, and plan management actions. The test case requires: (1) PrintAndPaymentHistoryPage page object with locators for billing_cycle_period_card, plan_pause_information, complimentary_pages_progress_bar, additional_pages_progress_bar, complimentary_pages_value_text, additional_pages_value_text, info icons, tooltips, and total_pages_printed_text - none of these elements exist in UpdatePlanPage. (2) Navigation methods to Print and Payment History page - UpdatePlanPage does not contain navigation to this page. (3) API helpers for time shift (32 days), billing charge trigger, and page printing simulation - no API helpers exist in this batch, only JSON payload files for printer status data. (4) Verification methods for progress bar colors (black, yellow), fill percentages, tooltip content, and page count displays - no such verification methods exist in UpdatePlanPage. (5) Test data for tooltip messages, expected page count values, and color constants - the RTPDS payload files contain printer status data unrelated to UI tooltip messages or billing cycle card displays, and address_data.json contains shipping addresses unrelated to this test. UpdatePlanPage is relevant to Instant Ink plan management workflows but serves a different purpose than the Print and Payment History page tested here. The UpdatePlanPage might be used in a broader test flow to change plans or pause/resume plans, but the specific billing cycle card verification steps in this test case occur on a completely different page. The page objects, locators, methods, and test data needed for this test case likely exist in other batches containing PrintAndPaymentHistoryPage, billing/payment page objects, API helper modules, and UI verification utilities.
